readout.purpose: The single oversized number — progress-ring center. Fira Code 800, tabular.

title.purpose: Page titles. Fixed rem, top of the document outline.

body.purpose: Prose, helper text. Public Sans, cap at 65–75ch.

data.purpose: Console rows, gate values, captured text. Fira Code 11px tabular.

label.purpose: The one caps style — section legends, pill text, metric labels. 10px/700/uppercase/0.1em/muted.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default for hover/focus/state changes — fast, no choreography.

motion.name: live-pulse
motion.purpose: The sanctioned brand moment — live-send dot and live-state accents pulse; suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion.

breakpoints.name: cockpit-col
breakpoints.purpose: The client cockpit send column — type must not fluidly shrink below this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Commit actions (Enviar). Wears the brand violet→cyan gradient — one of the ≤3 sanctioned moments per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(105deg, oklch(58% 0.22 295), oklch(78% 0.13 195)); color: oklch(99.11% 0 0); font-family: 'Public Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 0.25rem; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(60% 0.19 292); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: oklch(27.21% 0.0038 243); color: oklch(70.5% 0.0051 243); cursor: not-allowed; filter: none; }

components.name: Section Card (Rack Plate)
components.description: Signature plate: flat surface, 1px edge, caps legend engraved over the top border, optional 2px live-state left rail.
components.html:
NUEVO LOTE

Pega tus líneas y elige un gate.
components.css: .ds-plate { position: relative; background: oklch(21.03% 0.0051 243); border: 1px solid oklch(28% 0.0026 243); border-radius: 0.25rem; padding: 12px; color: oklch(99.11% 0.0026 243); } .ds-plate--sending { border-left: 2px solid oklch(60% 0.19 292); } .ds-plate__legend { position: absolute; top: -8px; left: 12px; height: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 6px; font-family: 'Public Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: oklch(70.5% 0.0051 243); background: linear-gradient(to bottom, oklch(12% 0.0026 243) 50%, oklch(21.03% 0.0051 243) 50%); } .ds-plate__body { margin: 8px 0 0; font-family: 'Public Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(70.5% 0.0051 243); }

components.name: State Pill
components.description: The only full-round shape. Alpha tint over its own semantic text color; optional pulsing dot for live state.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: 'Public Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-pill--accent { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(60% 0.19 292) 22%, transparent); color: oklch(60% 0.19 292); } .ds-pill--warning { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(82.03% 0.1395 75.04) 18%, transparent); color: oklch(82.03% 0.1395 75.04); } .ds-pill--danger { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(59.4% 0.1977 23.33) 18%, transparent); color: oklch(59.4% 0.1977 23.33); } .ds-pill__dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: currentColor; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) { .ds-pill--accent .ds-pill__dot { animation: ds-pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite; } } @keyframes ds-pulse { 50% { opacity: 0.4; } }

components.name: Data Row
components.description: Console-density captured-reply row: muted index, wrapping mono content, status glyph; success highlight when newly captured.
components.html: 14:32CC: 4242•••• Status: Livenueva✅
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(25% 0.0026 243); font-family: 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(99.11% 0.0026 243); } .ds-row--new { background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(73.29% 0.1945 149.51) 12%, transparent); color: oklch(73.29% 0.1945 149.51); } .ds-row__idx { flex-shrink: 0; color: oklch(70.5% 0.0051 243); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-row__text { min-width: 0; flex: 1; overflow-wrap: break-word; } .ds-row__tag { flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0 4px; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(73.29% 0.1945 149.51) 20%, transparent); color: oklch(73.29% 0.1945 149.51); } .ds-row__glyph { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text/textarea field: flat field face, transparent border at rest, 2px Solid Violet focus ring, placeholder at body contrast.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: oklch(21.03% 0.0051 243); color: oklch(99.11% 0.0026 243); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.25rem; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Public Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: outline 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(70.5% 0.0051 243); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(60% 0.19 292); outline-offset: 0; }

components.name: Mono Chip
components.description: Short machine identifier (gate value, name·value) in tabular mono on a secondary surface.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: oklch(25.7% 0.0038 243); border: 1px solid oklch(28% 0.0026 243); border-radius: 0.25rem; padding: 2px 6px; font-family: 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: oklch(99.11% 0.0026 243); }

components.name: Notice — Failure (Watchdog)
components.description: Account-wide failure strip (session lost / reply-rate collapse). Danger tone = a real stop. Action scoped to the owner; clears on the inbound WS event, never optimistically.
components.html: El bot dejó de responder y pausamos todos los envíos para proteger la cuenta.
components.css: .ds-notice { border-radius: 0.25rem; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Public Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; } .ds-notice--danger { border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(59.4% 0.1977 23.33) 50%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(59.4% 0.1977 23.33) 10%, transparent); } .ds-notice__msg { margin: 0; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(59.4% 0.1977 23.33); } .ds-notice__action { margin-top: 8px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(59.4% 0.1977 23.33) 50%, transparent); border-radius: 0.25rem; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(59.4% 0.1977 23.33); cursor: pointer; } .ds-notice__action:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(60% 0.19 292); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Notice — Waiting (Flood)
components.description: Account-wide wait strip (flood-wait, admission queue). Warning tone = waiting, NOT broken — the account is fine. No action; clears when the wait expires.
components.html: Telegram pidió esperar. Reanudamos solos en ~30s.
components.css: .ds-notice--warning { border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(82.03% 0.1395 75.04) 50%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(82.03% 0.1395 75.04) 10%, transparent); } .ds-notice--warning .ds-notice__msg { color: oklch(82.03% 0.1395 75.04); }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Invitation inside the panel it belongs to: caps eyebrow + one plain sentence + an optional REAL action. Never 'nothing here', never a dead button.
components.html:
SIN LOTE

Pega tus líneas y elige un gate.
components.css: .ds-empty { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 40px 12px; text-align: center; } .ds-empty__eyebrow { font-family: 'Public Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: oklch(70.5% 0.0051 243); } .ds-empty__msg { margin: 0; font-family: 'Public Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(70.5% 0.0051 243); }

components.name: Panel Skeleton
components.description: Shape-faithful loading: row-height bars in the panel's own gutter, never a floating spinner. Shape predicts the content so the layout doesn't jump.
components.css: .ds-skel { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 12px; } .ds-skel__bar { height: 16px; border-radius: 0.25rem; background: oklch(25.7% 0.0038 243); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) { .ds-skel__bar { animation: ds-shimmer 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; } } @keyframes ds-shimmer { 50% { opacity: 0.5; } }

narrative.overview: Ranger-X Check is an operator's console for a live system, not a brochure and not a toy. Both surfaces — client cockpit and admin panel — are designed to the same bar: calm dark plates that recede, legible state that never lies, and a single charge of brand color reserved for the moments that matter. The system is built like rack-mounted equipment: flat machined plates with a 1px hairline edge and a legend engraved over the top border, LED-style state pills, monospace readouts with tabular figures. Depth is tonal, never lifted — there are no shadows. Energy is punctuation: the Ranger-X violet→cyan gradient appears on the mark, the primary action, and a live pulse, surrounded by restraint everywhere else.
keyCharacteristics: Control-room calm by default; brand energy only in live moments.
Flat plates, tonal depth, zero elevation.
Monospace + tabular figures for every number and identifier.
Engraved caps legends over plate edges as the signature affordance.
One meaning per semantic tone; state never conveyed by color alone.
Dark-first, but both themes are first-class and pass contrast independently.

rules.name: The Moments Rule
rules.body: The brand gradient lives on ≤3 surfaces of any screen: the mark, the primary action, a live pulse. A fourth element gets Solid Violet or nothing. The rarity is the identity.

rules.name: The True-Gray Rule
rules.body: Neutrals carry hue but ~zero chroma. Don't warm or cool the grays toward the brand to feel branded — branding is the accent and the gradient, never a tinted field.

rules.name: The One-Tracking Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one tracked-caps style: 10px / 700 / uppercase / 0.1em / muted. Every divergent 0.08em/0.12em copy collapses into it. Caps are CSS-only — never ship an all-caps string.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Any digit that updates live is tabular-nums in Fira Code. Proportional figures jitter as values change; in a real-time tool that reads as instability.

rules.name: The Flat-Plate Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are machined plates, not raised cards. To separate two regions, step the tonal surface or add a 1px hairline — never a shadow. A drop shadow is the tell that this stopped being a control room.

dos: Do reserve the violet→cyan gradient for ≤3 moments per screen — the mark, the primary action, a live pulse.
Do set every live-updating number in Fira Code tabular-nums so digits don't jitter.
Do build depth with tonal surface steps and the 1px hairline, never a shadow.
Do pair every semantic color with a glyph, icon, or label — state must survive color-blindness and grayscale.
Do route new accent usage to Solid Violet; treat any legacy hue-243 blue as debt to migrate.
Do keep both themes passing contrast independently, placeholders at body contrast, and a visible 2px Solid-Violet focus ring on every control.
Do use the engraved caps legend as the single section-label voice.
donts: Don't clip the gradient to text (background-clip: text). The gradient lives on fills, the mark, and the pulse — never on letters.
Don't reintroduce the generic blue-SaaS accent (hue-243). It is the exact anti-reference the rebrand escapes.
Don't import crypto/pump aesthetics — exchange neons, moon glow, garish glowing dashboards.
Don't add gamer/esports chrome — bevels, 3D extrude, circuit-trace overlays. Keep the gradient concept, drop the chrome.
Don't go childish — pastels, emoji confetti, bubbly kid-app rounding.
Don't add a drop shadow anywhere. Separate regions with tonal steps or a hairline.
Don't use a colored border-left as a decorative stripe. The only sanctioned 2px left rail is the rack-plate's live-state indicator.
Don't wallpaper the gradient across panels or per-card. Rarity is the point.
Don't introduce a display font or oversized fluid headings. Type is functional, scale is fixed-rem.
